headline: Shareholder Pressure Meets New Digital Workflows For Align Technology
summary: Align Technology (NasdaqGS:ALGN) is facing increased shareholder activism that could influence its strategy, governance, and capital allocation. The activism is emerging at the same time as Align rolls out new digital orthodontic workflows, including the Invisalign Specifix Attachment System and upgraded planning tools. This combination of external pressure and product launches is drawing attention to how management will prioritize resources and decision making. For investors tracking Align...
